title: Stargate Early Loading
description: NeoForge early loading screen with animated stargates
body: Custom loading screen with animated Stargate from [StargateJourney](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/sgjourney) by Povstalec (Wold). Replaces the early Neoforge loading and the first game loading. If you are not interested in stargate, you can check the [Simple Custom Early loading mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/simple-custom-early-loading) that allows you to customize the early loading with your own images and animations. Please note that I am releasing it for now only for testing purposes; it's not well-tested yet. The Stargate and background can be customized with resourcepacks made for StargateJourney. You can find more information on [GitHub](https://github.com/lukaskabc/StargateEarlyLoading).
